title.purpose: Mac content headings and major panel titles.

label.purpose: Buttons, tabs, status, and compact metadata.

shadows.name: window-ambient
shadows.purpose: Separates the Mac window from the prototype canvas.

shadows.name: device-ambient
shadows.purpose: Separates the phone silhouette from the prototype canvas.

shadows.name: control-lift
shadows.purpose: Marks a selected concept in the prototype toolbar.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single highest-priority action on a screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 44px; padding: 0 24px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--primary, oklch(0.54 0.11 196)); color: white; font: 700 0.75rem/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; transition: filter 120ms ease-out, transform 120ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(0.94); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--primary, oklch(0.54 0.11 196)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A familiar bordered control for secondary commands.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid var(--line, oklch(0.88 0.012 210)); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--surface, white); color: var(--ink, oklch(0.18 0.018 220)); font: 700 0.75rem/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; transition: background 120ms ease-out, transform 120ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--surface-2, oklch(0.975 0.006 200)); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--primary, oklch(0.54 0.11 196)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: A quiet field for sending text to the connected Mac.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 48px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid var(--line, oklch(0.88 0.012 210)); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--surface-2, oklch(0.975 0.006 200)); color: var(--ink, oklch(0.18 0.018 220)); font: 400 1rem/1.45 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--primary, oklch(0.54 0.11 196)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Connection Status
components.description: A text-backed semantic status for the live session.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--primary-soft, oklch(0.94 0.035 196)); color: var(--primary-strong, oklch(0.49 0.11 196)); font: 700 0.75rem/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; } .ds-status i { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.62 0.15 145); }

components.name: Segmented Navigation
components.description: Three stable mobile modes above the active control surface.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 4px; padding: 4px; border-radius: 10px; background: var(--surface-2, oklch(0.975 0.006 200)); } .ds-tab { min-height: 44px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: var(--muted, oklch(0.47 0.018 220)); font: 700 0.75rem/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; } .ds-tab:hover { color: var(--ink, oklch(0.18 0.018 220)); } .ds-tab-active { background: var(--primary, oklch(0.54 0.11 196)); color: white; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--primary, oklch(0.54 0.11 196)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Trackpad Surface
components.description: The dominant direct-manipulation region on mobile.
components.css: .ds-trackpad { position: relative; width: 280px; height: 320px; border: 1px solid var(--line, oklch(0.88 0.012 210)); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--surface-2, oklch(0.975 0.006 200)); } .ds-trackpad:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--primary, oklch(0.54 0.11 196)); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-pointer { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 45%; width: 18px; height: 18px; border: 2px solid var(--primary, oklch(0.54 0.11 196)); border-radius: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); } .ds-scroll { position: absolute; top: 24px; right: 12px; width: 4px; height: 52px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--primary, oklch(0.54 0.11 196)); }

narrative.overview: TouchDock should feel like a reliable signal passing directly between two personal devices: immediate, private, and calm. Familiar Mac and mobile conventions let the product disappear behind the task.
keyCharacteristics: Connection state is always visible and stated in words, never color alone.
A 4px spacing foundation creates compact controls and generous separation between workflows.
Corners stay gently curved at 6px, 10px, or 14px; pills are reserved for status.
Motion acknowledges state within 120–180ms and never delays control.
The mobile trackpad remains the dominant surface; shortcuts stay secondary.

rules.name: The Signal Rarity Rule
rules.body: Signal Teal marks primary action, selection, or live feedback and occupies no more than 10% of a TouchDock screen.

rules.name: The Status Has Words Rule
rules.body: Green, amber, and coral always appear with a label, icon, or action name.

rules.name: The Native Voice Rule
rules.body: Use one system sans family throughout product UI; display fonts and decorative mono labels are forbidden.

rules.name: The Ambient-Only Rule
rules.body: Shadows identify physical device layers, never ordinary cards, list rows, or nested content.

dos: Do use WCAG AA contrast, visible focus rings, 44px minimum touch targets, and text labels beside status color.
Do use the 4/8/12/16/24/32/48px spacing scale and group related controls tightly.
Do reserve Signal Teal for primary action, current selection, connection state, and live input feedback.
Do use immediate 120–180ms state transitions and provide a reduced-motion alternative.
Do preserve familiar Mac trackpad, keyboard, arrow-key, and shortcut conventions.
donts: Don't create generic admin dashboards or fill the interface with interchangeable statistic cards.
Don't use gaming-control aesthetics, excessive black-and-neon styling, or fluorescent inactive controls.
Don't use decorative glass panels, glassmorphism, gradient text, decorative blobs, or nested cards.
Don't make controls cartoonish or let visual effects compete with the primary input surface.
Don't use a colored side stripe greater than 1px, broad decorative shadows on bordered cards, or card radii above 16px.
Don't rely on color alone for connection, permission, warning, or error states.
